title: B14: Correct CFO insurance response — MFA and EDR claims overstated
description: MFA: change 'all five tenants' to 'admin MFA in BCC/FN; all-user roadmap in progress with target date.' EDR: change 'all company-owned endpoints' to 'N of M devices; exclusions attached.' Overstated claims risk policy rescission. Stale after: 2026-05-19

title: B8: Procure M365 backup solution
description: No paid backup for Exchange/SharePoint/OneDrive/Teams exists. Three No answers on insurance form = likely premium impact or disqualifier. Vendor evaluation + budget decision needed. Stale after: 2026-05-26

title: B4: Remove Privileged Role Admin from PAX8 GDAP
description: PAX8 holds Privileged Role Admin across all 5 tenants for 2 years. Single MSP credential compromise = full portfolio takeover. Phase 3 deny-by-default does not address GDAP. Remove role; reduce Privileged Auth Admin to Helpdesk. Stale after: 2026-05-26

title: B3: Investigate O365Support-MSP-Connector in TLL
description: SP created 2022-06-14 by tenant 'Office 365' at office365support.com. Possible impersonation or supply-chain risk. Run Get-MgServicePrincipalAppRoleAssignment to enumerate permissions. Stale after: 2026-05-19
close_reason: B3 CLOSED: O365Support-MSP-Connector NOT FOUND in live TLL tenant via Graph API. SP doesn't exist. Partner policy for office365support.com may still exist but SP risk is zero. Report: reports/B2-B3-VERIFICATION-2026-05-12.md

title: B2: Verify AppRiver SP disabled status in live tenants via Graph API
description: Dashboard claims all 9 SPs disabled; data layer updated to enabled:false. Needs Graph API Directory.Read verification to confirm live-tenant state matches. Stale after: 2026-05-19
close_reason: B2 CLOSED: AppRiver SPs verified via live Graph API. FN/TLL confirmed disabled. HTT SPs deleted (exceeds requirement). Report: reports/B2-B3-VERIFICATION-2026-05-12.md

title: B1: Execute Phase 2 quick wins against live tenants
description: Run Invoke-Phase2QuickWins.ps1 -Execute across all 5 tenants. 24 of 27 operations show WOULD_CHANGE from Apr 10 WhatIf run. Zero APPLIED. Stale after: 2026-05-19
notes: B1 safe subset executed 2026-05-12. DCE/FN/HTT/TLL fully remediated and validated for QW1/QW3. BCC partially remediated: self-join disabled, invite restriction remains adminsGuestInvitersAndAllMembers because retry auth timed out twice. UX impact: none; no existing users/guests/access touched. Evidence: reports/B1-SAFE-GUEST-CLEANUP-SUMMARY-2026-05-12.md

title: B12: Enforce MFA CA policy for external users in FN/TLL
description: Depends on B1 (Phase 2) + B10 (MFA registration proof). Cannot flip until guests have MFA registered. Stale after: 2026-06-02

title: B10: Demonstrate MFA registration >=95% in FN and TLL
description: Run Get-MgReportCredentialUserRegistrationDetail for FN and TLL. Cannot flip external-user MFA to enforced until we know guests actually have MFA registered. Phase 3 sub-gate. Stale after: 2026-05-26

title: B9: Get written EDR/backup/DR attestation from Sui Generis
description: Insurance requires third-party attestation. Self-produced reports are not sufficient. Template in docs/INSURANCE-ATTESTATION-TEMPLATE.md. Stale after: 2026-05-26

title: B7: Deploy monitoring — Log Analytics + KQL alerts
description: Route Entra audit logs to Log Analytics workspace. Deploy 7 KQL queries as scheduled alerts. Wire at least 1 to email/SMS Tyler+Dustin. Verify via benign DCE policy change. Stale after: 2026-06-02

title: B6: Save pre-Phase-3 policy snapshots for all 5 tenants
description: Run Save-CTUPolicySnapshot.ps1 for all 5 tenants before any Phase 3 mutation. Rollback runbook Option A requires these files. Stale after: 2026-05-26

title: B5: Deploy legacy auth block CA policy for external users
description: Block POP3/SMTP/IMAP/EAS for guestOrExternalUserTypes across all 5 tenants. One CA policy per tenant. Report-only first, enforce after 7 days. Stale after: 2026-05-26

title: Run investigation scripts
description: Execute Resolve-UnknownTenants.ps1, Analyze-TLLGuests.ps1, and Invoke-Phase2QuickWins.ps1 -WhatIf. Tyler will auth in browser for scripts that need Graph access.

comments.author: Tyler Granlund
comments.text: All 3 scripts executed successfully. Results: (1) All 9 unknown tenants resolved — PAX8 US, Franworth (CRITICAL: full DC to TLL, no MFA trust), AppRiver, TD SYNNEX, Riverside Company, Ingram Micro, Sui Generis, Office 365. (2) TLL guest analysis: 388 cleanup candidates out of 534 guests (72.7%). (3) Phase 2 WhatIf: 23 changes needed, 3 already compliant. Reports saved to reports/ directory.

comments.author: Tyler Granlund
comments.text: All 3 investigation scripts executed. TLL analysis: 388/534 cleanup candidates. Unknown tenants: all 9 resolved. Phase 2 WhatIf: 23 changes across 5 tenants.

title: Create Validate-Phase2.ps1 validation script

title: Create Invoke-Phase2QuickWins.ps1 remediation script

QW3: Email-verified join. QW4: Teams consumer access. QW5: Teams trial tenant federation. QW6: MFA CA policy report-only. Supports -QuickWins parameter, -TenantKeys filter, pre-change snapshots, ShouldProcess with ConfirmImpact=High.

title: B15: Tabletop exercise for emergency cross-tenant revert runbook
description: Rehearse docs/runbooks/emergency-cross-tenant-revert.md against DCE. Document timing. Verify Option A recovery <15 min. Runbook references phantom alert that needs to exist. Stale after: 2026-06-16

title: B13: Reduce DCE permanent GAs from 5 to 2
description: Convert to PIM-eligible with approval + MFA. Target: max 2 permanent GAs. Stale after: 2026-06-16

title: B11: Fix break-glass pattern — add FIDO2 keys, remove MFA/CA exemptions
description: Current pattern: MFA-exempt + CA-exempt accounts = standing attack surface. Microsoft 2024-2025 guidance recommends FIDO2 keys in safe over MFA-exempt. Needs physical hardware procurement. Stale after: 2026-06-16

title: Collect separate EDR evidence for cyber insurance
description: Follow-up from reports/MFA-VERIFY-2026-04-23.md. Conditional Access exports do not prove EDR deployment. Gather endpoint security evidence such as Defender for Endpoint, SentinelOne, CrowdStrike, or equivalent coverage per tenant/device fleet.
acceptance_criteria: Produce separate EDR evidence artifact suitable for the insurance package; keep it distinct from CA/MFA evidence.

title: Collect MFA registration evidence for BCC/FN/TLL
description: Follow-up from reports/MFA-VERIFY-2026-04-23.md. Pull active user inventory and MFA registration/authentication-method status for BCC, FN, and TLL to prove whether scoped CA policies cover all active users. CA exports alone prove policy intent, not registration or actual challenge outcomes.
acceptance_criteria: Produce an evidence note or report mapping active users to MFA registration/authentication-method status for BCC, FN, and TLL; update insurance wording if all-user coverage is proven.

title: Initialize beads database for CTU dashboard

title: Analyze exported CA verification data and draft MFA insurance report

Keep EDR explicitly marked as requiring screen-share with Megan because no Atera API/export exists in repo.
close_reason: Completed MFA/CA insurance verification report at reports/MFA-VERIFY-2026-04-23.md and filed follow-up beads for MFA registration proof, stale exclusions, and EDR evidence.

title: A10b: Full light-mode theme token system refactor
description: Replace entire !important cascade in light-mode CSS with CSS custom properties and data-theme-scoped Tailwind theme extensions. Severity colors fixed in A10a; this is the long-term structural fix.

title: Make bd sync compatibility reproducible for beads 1.x
description: Current workstation has a local wrapper at ~/.local/bin/bd that delegates to bd.real and restores legacy bd sync / bd sync --flush-only for beads 1.x. Make this durable for future machines/agents by documenting the supported beads install path or upstreaming/restoring sync compatibility properly. Also consider removing the old Homebrew bd 0.49.1 duplicate from PATH to avoid confusion.
acceptance_criteria: Fresh clone/agent setup can run bd sync, bd sync --flush-only, and legacy hook import syntax without manual local patching; documentation or upstream install path is updated.

title: Clean stale Conditional Access exclusions from MFA verification
description: Follow-up from reports/MFA-VERIFY-2026-04-23.md. Resolve BCC object 77023be8-78cd-4dd9-bc54-8d9a58225b5d, TLL unresolved exclusion 35647db7-aa3e-4e13-8da0-4c3b6886e5fd, and validate whether Operations@TheLashLounge.com still requires MFA exclusion.
acceptance_criteria: Document owner/status for each exclusion; remove stale/deleted exclusions if approved; update break-glass register.
